name: Turkey Run Golf Course
about: Turkey Run Golf Club is a versatile recreational facility that combines a traditional outdoor golf course with modern indoor entertainment. The venue features a Full Swing Pro Simulator within the Par-Tee Room, allowing guests to play virtual rounds across 14 different sports regardless of weather conditions. The establishment serves as a community hub with weekly leagues for men, women, and mixed groups, alongside structured membership options for frequent players. The facility prioritizes a casual, family-friendly atmosphere, offering a full-service menu of comfort foods like blooming onions, wings, and flatbread pizzas to complement the golfing experience. With flexible day and night hourly rates, the club caters to both serious golfers looking to practice and social groups seeking entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines outdoor course access with indoor Full Swing Pro simulators
Full restaurant menu featuring appetizers, wings, pizzas, and salads
Variety of leagues including Men's, Ladies', and Mixed leagues
Family-friendly atmosphere with arcade games available
Reasonable hourly rates for simulator play

food_and_drink.notes: Extensive menu including starters, wings, subs, wraps, flatbread pizzas, and salads.

simulator_hardware.notes: Full Swing Pro Simulator installed in the Par-Tee Room.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue may provide rentals. It is recommended to call ahead to confirm availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Turkey Run Golf Club offers a full kitchen and bar menu featuring a wide variety of appetizers, pizzas, and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator takes between 45 and 60 minutes, depending on the group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Turkey Run is family-friendly. The venue has arcade games and a simulator room suitable for all ages, with specific pricing available for juniors.
